sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97975" key="sugxala/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγχᾰλάω</orth>, <sense id="n97975.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">relax with</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">at the same time</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0620.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archyt.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
